configurations.name: manava-dev
runtimeArgs: cd ~/Workspace/Manava && (docker start manava-frontend-dev 2>/dev/null || docker run -d --name manava-frontend-dev --network manava-net -v /home/haqeem/Workspace/Manava/manava-app:/app -v manava_frontend_node_modules:/app/node_modules -w /app -e VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4000 -p 127.0.0.1:5173:5173 node:20-alpine sh -c 'npm install && npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173') && docker logs -f manava-frontend-dev
